entry-setup.name: Entry Setup
entry-setup.title: Entry Setup
entry-setup.content:
# Entry Setup

The `@acme/ui` eval package is already available in this project.

## Styles

Import `@acme/ui/styles.css` exactly once from the app entry file before rendering any Acme UI components.

provider-setup.name: Provider Setup
provider-setup.title: Provider Setup
provider-setup.content:
# Provider Setup

## Root provider

Wrap the rendered app in `<AcmeProvider theme="midnight" density="comfortable">`.

## Root container

Place your UI inside an element with `data-acme-app="true"`.

release-notes.name: Release Notes
release-notes.title: Release Notes
release-notes.content:
# Release Notes

This docs entry is intentionally not tagged as setup instructions.
